title: Catawba museum announces hours
description: The Jump River Valley Historical Society announced their summer hours will be 9 a.m. to 4 p.m. for two Saturdays a month from June through September. The 2026 theme for the historical society is “Preserving the past for the future...

title: Trump eases refrigerant rule in a bid to address surging grocery costs
description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration on Thursday loosened federal rules requiring grocery stores and air-conditioning companies to reduce greenhouse gas emissions from cooling equipment, a step that President Donald Trump said would help lower grocery costs.

title: Victim injured in Memorial Drive shooting describes terrifying moments before he was shot
description: One of the victims seriously injured in last week's brazen shooting on Memorial Drive in Cambridge says he is grateful to be alive after being shot multiple times.

title: Kazakhstan increased agricultural exports to China by 82.4% in the first quarter of 2026
description: Kazakhstan increased its agricultural exports to China by 82.4% to $550 million in January-March 2026. This was announced following a meeting between the Vice Minister of Agriculture of Kazakhstan, Yermek Kenzhekhanuly, and the head of China's State Administration of Food and Strategic Reserves, Liu Huansheng.

title: Hospital 'very concerned' about patient flow without transitional care unit
description: Greatly needed long-term care space is being created with the return of 64 beds to their intended purpose, but unless new supports are added the change could strain acute care capacity.
